settings.info: Use a scheme with a transparent background for text overlays. Recommend making this "Scheme 3" as this is the default for banner sections.

settings.content: The mobile menu uses dropdown menu colors.
If all product images are set on a very light background, this can blend that background into a light color. [Read more](https://cleancanvas.co.uk/support/beautify/settings/product-image-blend)

settings.label: Blend product images
settings.info: Does not apply to product cards when image cutout is enabled.

settings.label: Blend background color
settings.info: Choose a very light color

settings.label: Headings capitalization
settings.info: Some sections can over-ride this setting.

settings.label: Body text capitalization
settings.info: Applies to all text that is not a heading or subheading or entered via a rich text editor.

settings.label: Maximum content width
settings.info: Some images and colors will always be full screen width.

settings.label: Arrow buttons visibility on large screens

settings.content: Select the templates to display breadcrumbs on.

settings.label: Products
settings.info: To include the Collection Page within a products breadcrumb, ensure the Product cards setting "Include the collection within the URL" is enabled. [Learn more](/editor?context=theme&category=product%20cards)

settings.label: Show product breadcrumb on mobile
settings.info: Only applies if product breadcrumbs are enabled (above).

settings.label: Show RSS icon in blogs breadcrumb

settings.content: This applies to pagination on Collection Pages, Collection List Page and the Search Page.

settings.label: Enable infinite scroll
settings.info: More results will automatically load as the user scrolls the page.

settings.label: Include the collection within the URL
settings.info: The URL to the product page will include the current collection if applicable.

settings.label: Image fit
settings.info: Choose "Natural" to avoid cropping the image or "Cover" to fill available space (image may be cropped).

settings.label: Image alignment
settings.info: This only applies if the "Image fit" is set to "Cover"

settings.label: Hover image fit
settings.info: Choose "Natural" to avoid cropping the image or "Cover" to fill available space (image may be cropped).

settings.label: Hover image alignment
settings.info: This only applies if the "Hover image fit" is set to "Cover"

settings.label: Show rating
settings.info: To show a rating, add a product rating app which supports Shopifys standard rating metafield.

settings.label: Truncate title
settings.info: Restrict title to a specific number of lines.

settings.label: Show subtitle
settings.info: Uses standard product subtitle [metafield](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/metafields) with the namespace and key: "descriptors.subtitle".

settings.label: Truncate subtitle
settings.info: Restrict subtitle to a specific number of lines.

settings.label: Display inline price
settings.info: Display price alongside title.

settings.label: Enable single-click add
settings.info: Shows for single-variant products

settings.label: Fix the Quick Shop footer to the bottom of the drawer when it scrolls
settings.info: If you have many buy buttons, you may want to turn this off to show more product information.

settings.label: Image fit
settings.info: Choose "Natural" to avoid cropping the image or "Cover" to fill available space (image may be cropped).

settings.label: Image alignment
settings.info: This only applies if the "Image fit" is set to "Cover"

settings.content: To categorize variant swatches into shades, create a variant metafield with namespace and key "theme.shade" and set this on the relevant variants.
To categorize combined products into shades add a product metafield with namespace/key theme.shade on relevant products.

Group multiple products to display as a single product. Ideal for showcasing multiple product colors within a single collection, while providing variant-style selection on the product page. [Learn more](https://cleancanvas.co.uk/support/beautify/combined-products).

settings.label: Combined products metafield
settings.info: Use the namespace and key of the product metafield containing a list of products.

settings.label: Combined products metaobject field
settings.info: When using metaobjects, use the key of the metaobject field containing a list of products.

settings.label: Show combined products as swatches in product cards
Combined product selector label
settings.info: If a combined product has an option matching this name, it will be hidden. Do not include a colon.

settings.label: Combined product selector size
settings.info: Set to 24px to match swatch size.

settings.content: Product labels are shown on the product card and in a block on the product page.

settings.label: Show "Sale" label
settings.info: On products for which the compare-at price is set.

settings.label: Show "Low stock" label
settings.info: Single variant products only

settings.label: Show "New" label for products in the following collections
Show "New" label for products with the following tag
Show "New" label for products created within this many days

settings.content: A product is a preorder if its template name contains the word "preorder". [Read more](https://cleancanvas.co.uk/support/beautify/preorder)
Add a product metafield with the namespace and key "theme.label" with the "Single line text" type.
Add a product metafield with the namespace and key "theme.label_2" with the "Single line text" type.
Add a product metafield with the namespace and key "theme.label_3" with the "Single line text" type.

settings.content: Gift wrap product will be excluded from Featured Collection and Recommendations. It should not be possible for it to go out of stock.
Dynamic recommendations are based on your cart contents and will change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/themes/development/recommended-products)

settings.label: Minimum order amount
settings.info: Enter minimum order amount(s) to qualify for free shipping (one per line). Format instructions and examples below.

settings.content: USD:50 = $50 USD for any country without an individual amount specified.
Country specific amounts MUST COME BEFORE general currency amounts.

settings.content: For assistance with writing custom code or fixing issues that arise from custom code, please hire an expert Shopify developer.

settings.info: Placed at the end of the head tag. Included on all theme pages - this does not include the checkout.

settings.content: For a full list of JavaScript events included, please refer to the /assets/custom.js file within the theme code, or read our [JavaScript Technical Guide](https://cleancanvas.co.uk/support/beautify/technical-guides/js).
